Summary
Senior backend engineer with 8+ years building distributed systems at scale. Led teams of up to 12 engineers. Passionate about system design, reliability, and mentoring junior engineers.

Experience
Google — Senior Software Engineer
January 2020 - Present
San Francisco, CA
- Architected a high-throughput event processing pipeline handling 5M events/day using Kafka and Go, reducing end-to-end latency by 40%
- Led a team of 8 engineers to redesign the user notification service, increasing delivery reliability from 94% to 99.7%
- Spearheaded migration from monolithic architecture to microservices, reducing deployment time by 60%
- Mentored 4 junior engineers through the promotion process to L4

Stripe — Software Engineer
March 2017 - December 2019
San Francisco, CA
- Built the real-time fraud detection API serving 50K requests/second with p99 latency under 100ms using Python and Redis
- Designed and implemented a distributed rate limiter used across 12 internal services
- Reduced infrastructure costs by $2.1M/year by optimizing database query patterns and implementing connection pooling
- Managed the on-call rotation for the Payments API team of 6 engineers

Startup Co — Junior Software Engineer
June 2015 - February 2017
New York, NY
- Developed REST APIs using Django and PostgreSQL for the core product
- Implemented CI/CD pipeline using Jenkins, reducing deployment frequency from weekly to daily
- Helped build the initial data pipeline processing 100K records/day
